title: Chopper Guards the Merry — Part 5
description: Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
scene: Across pages 19, this scene centers on Luffy, Chopper, Gan Fall, Gedatsu, Nami. Separated from the others, Chopper tries to protect the Going Merry while danger closes in around the sacrificial altar.
